selectChat: Select or create a chat from the left
inputPlaceholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
systemPromptPlaceholder: Set a custom task prompt for this chat...
noProfileWarning: Please select a browser profile first. Without one, browser tools will be unavailable.

fileSystem.createFolderDescription: Create a new folder in the current directory.
fileSystem.selectDirHint: Select a folder on the left to view or edit its description
fileSystem.descPlaceholder: Write a description for this directory (Markdown). The AI reads this to decide how to use the directory...
fileSystem.preferencesDescription: Manage the AI default workspace and any extra external directories it can access.
fileSystem.sandboxCardDescription: This decides where the AI works and creates files by default.
fileSystem.sandboxRootHint: Leave empty to use the default path (appData/fs)
fileSystem.sandboxTip: Use one stable directory when possible so the AI keeps a predictable default workspace.
fileSystem.whitelistCardDescription: Add frequently used directories here so the AI can read them in this chat.
fileSystem.whitelistTip: Whitelisted directories are exposed as read-only by default, which fits source repos and reference folders.

skills.title: Skills
skills.pageDescription: View, enable, and manage in-app skills in one list. Creating and editing still use dialogs.
skills.empty: No skills yet. Click + to create one.
skills.dialogDescription: Create or update the skill metadata and body here.
skills.builtInReadonly: Built-in skills are read-only and cannot be edited or deleted in the app.
skills.bodyPlaceholder: Describe the skill's capabilities and behavior...
skills.fieldAllowedTools: Allowed Tools (one per line, empty = all)
skills.installDescription: Install a skill from skills.sh, GitHub, or a direct SKILL.md link into the app.
skills.installHint: Supports skills.sh links, GitHub URLs, owner/repo/path, or direct SKILL.md links.

mcp.empty: No MCP servers yet. Click + to create one.
mcp.emptyHint: Click + in the top left to add an MCP server
mcp.selectOrCreate: Select or create an MCP server
mcp.dialogDescription: Create or update the MCP server configuration here.
mcp.discoverNeedsUrl: Please fill in the server URL first
mcp.confirmDeleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. The server configuration will be permanently deleted.
mcp.noTools: No tools available from this server
mcp.commandRequired: A command is required for stdio transport
mcp.argsJsonInvalid: Arguments must be a valid JSON array
mcp.envJsonInvalid: Environment variables must be a valid JSON object
mcp.headersJsonInvalid: Request headers must be a valid JSON object
mcp.oauthConfigRequired: Please fill in the OAuth config first
